title: Happy Ghast Datapack Backport
description: A basic backport of the Happy Ghast to older versions of Minecraft through the use of datapacks. Multiplayer friendly
body:
This datapack adds **Happy Ghasts** to older versions of minecraft! This is a multiplayer friendly version with an accurate crafting recipe.

This is a datapack so some bugs and limitations are present, but you can freely move around the world with your friends normally.

_Recipe_:
Combine 1 soul sand with 8 ghast tears around it.
